prompt: A full-body anime illustration of a cute young woman seated backward on a wooden dining chair in a clean studio setting with a soft off-white background. She has very long flowing pastel pink hair styled in 2 low twin tails, each tied with 1 fluffy pom-pom hair accessory and 1 blue ribbon, for a total of 2 pom-poms and 2 ribbon bows. Her pose is shy and slightly flirtatious: she straddles the chair facing its backrest, leans forward with both arms folded on top of the chair back, and rests her face on her arms while looking toward the viewer. Her legs are elongated and elegant, extending diagonally forward with the ankles crossed and bare feet visible. She wears an oversized loose beige cardigan slipping off one shoulder, a short purple plaid pleated mini skirt, a visible thin-strap camisole or bra top underneath, and sheer black pantyhose. Emphasize glossy, silky hair strands, delicate skin shading, subtle fabric folds, and semi-realistic anime rendering with polished soft lighting. The chair is a medium-brown wooden chair with a cushioned beige back panel and seat. Composition is vertical, centered, and fashion-illustration-like, showing the entire chair and full legs and feet, with a minimalist background and no extra objects.
